pages.title: Hold a point
pages.text: $(l)山 → 泉/泉印 → 稳$()$(br2)山 creates cover, 泉 restores health, 稳 keeps you from being knocked out of position. Use before 入 or when defending a chokepoint.

pages.title: Control terrain
pages.text: $(l)裂 → pull enemies around it → 山 block route$()$(br2)裂 is not a kill trap. It changes movement and buys position. 山 cuts line of sight or closes a route.

pages.title: Field fight
pages.text: $(l)心/救/忍 → 墨 → 怒$()$(br2)墨 greatly increases rewards and pressure. It also makes monsters tougher and costs extra durability, so prepare survival before opening it.
